evidence.observation: The showcase now moves a developer through one compact command-to-demo-to-evidence narrative while preserving the GitHub and install paths.
Manual desktop review found one dominant promise, one primary action, a subordinate build signal, and no competing principle or feature sections.
System sans, serif, and monospace roles separate product promise, contextual specimen, and operational evidence without external font cost.
The asymmetric technical desktop opening recomposes into a clear mobile sequence; duplicate method and principle sections were removed.
Four main sections remain—hero, contextual demo, inspectable rules, and install—and each has a distinct job.
Pointer mode switching, honest specimen expansion, token-order-independent rule search, filter states, and clipboard success were observed; real-device keyboard activation remains unverified.
The local demo covers selected and expanded states; the explorer covers loading, loaded, filtered, empty, and unavailable outcomes; clipboard success and blocked recovery copy are implemented.

Semantic landmarks, native controls, accessible names and state, skip navigation, visible focus, reduced motion, forced colors, and zero mobile overflow are implemented; no full screen-reader session ran.
Manual review covered 1440×1000 and 390×844; both retained zero horizontal overflow, and document height fell materially at both sizes.

The standalone production build contains 18 files and 623,828 bytes including its read-only corpus snapshot, with 10,369 bytes of JavaScript and no third-party runtime, external font, analytics, or media request.
Source-visible copy fell from 474 to 186 words (61%) while preserving task, trust boundary, recovery, install, and evidence information.
The precision-runtime system uses a dark grid, cyan structure, acid state signal, compact build sequence, and contextual art-direction shifts without generic glass or gradient stacks.
The implementation remains dependency-free vanilla HTML, role-token CSS, and a small state-owned script with a deterministic Python build.
No external visual reference was supplied; fidelity was checked against the explicit concise, modern, technical user direction and recorded design thesis.

Manual review found no centered generic hero, three-card feature parade, fabricated proof, glass stack, purple aura, or decorative dashboard metrics; technical chrome maps to real plugin workflow and evidence.
The production build, all local artifact routes, contextual specimen, flexible search, filters, clipboard action, and GitHub links work without implying a generation backend or external submission.
